result.reason: Console/notification pane misaligns with the tab strip due to incorrect rectangle height calculation in DockPaneStripNG (adds DocumentStripGapTop to height instead of subtracting).
result.approach: Fix TabStripRectangle_Document height formula: change rect.Height + DocumentStripGapTop - DocumentStripGapBottom to rect.Height - DocumentStripGapTop - DocumentStripGapBottom to correctly account for the top gap in the strip height.

attempts.raw_output:
Based on my analysis of the codebase and the issue title "Console pane is out of position with tab panel":

- This is a UI layout bug in `DockPaneStripNG.cs` where the tab strip rectangle height calculation at line 124 uses `rect.Height + DocumentStripGapTop - DocumentStripGapBottom` (adds gap to height instead of subtracting), which can cause pane misalignment with the document tab panel.
- The "console pane" in mRemoteNG refers to the notification/log tool window pane at the bottom.
- This is related to the custom `DockPaneStripNG` strip rendering logic.

```json
{"decision":"implement","reason":"Console/notification pane misaligns with the tab strip due to incorrect rectangle height calculation in DockPaneStripNG (adds DocumentStripGapTop to height instead of subtracting).","priority":"P2-bug","estimated_files":["mRemoteNG/UI/Tabs/DockPaneStripNG.cs"],"approach":"Fix TabStripRectangle_Document height formula: change rect.Height + DocumentStripGapTop - DocumentStripGapBottom to rect.Height - DocumentStripGapTop - DocumentStripGapBottom to correctly account for the top gap in the strip height."}
```
